title: aster graveolens
intro: Aster graveolens, also known as Camphor Aster or German Camomile, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The plant has been used to alleviate various health issues, such as insomnia, anxiety, and skin irritations, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Aster graveolens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
